POS – Detailed Engineering | IMA Org Chart Tool
PTSC OFFSHORE SERVICES (POS) Detailed Engineering Team · Organization Chart · Man-hour · Schedule
Tên đỏ = Detailed Engineering · tên đen đậm = Construction Engineering. Lead sẽ không bị lặp ở danh sách team member.
① Tiêu đề & Quản lý▸
② Khối Discipline (12)▸
1. Process6 👤
2. Mechanical4 👤
3. Piping15 👤
4. Structural9 👤
5. Civil1 👤
6. Electrical3 👤
7. Instrument & Telecom5 👤
8. Safety3 👤
9. 3D Modeling3 👤
10. Lifting9 👤
11. Pipeline1 👤
12. Naval Architect1 👤
②b PMT / QA-QC (bên trái) (2)▸
1. QA/QC & Document Control1 👤
2. PMT1 👤

PMT và QA/QC & Document Control nằm bên trái, sát khối Engineering Manager / Deputy Engineering Manager và có boundary riêng. Khi thêm thành viên vào 2 nhóm này, sơ đồ tự giãn chiều cao — các discipline bên dưới được đẩy xuống, không bị đè.

③ Boundary (3)▸

Dùng boundary để khoanh vùng Main disciplines và Side disciplines (vd: 3D Modeling). Fill color giúp phân biệt main / side.

④ Chú giải & Màu tên▸

Tên màu đỏ = Detailed Engineering (tick IMA trong DS_TK_IMA). Tên màu đen đậm = Construction Engineering. Tick/bỏ tick trong bảng sẽ đổi màu tự động. Tên "TBA" (in nghiêng) = vị trí giữ chỗ — màu đỏ/đen theo tick IMA giống nhân sự khác nhưng KHÔNG tính vào tổng nhân sự ở mọi tab cho đến khi đổi thành tên thật.

⑤ Thành viên đang chọn▸

Nhấp vào một tên trong sơ đồ để chỉnh sửa. Mọi thay đổi đồng bộ với DS_TK_IMA / DS_TK_ALL.

Nhấp ô dự án để tick: ✓ tick mới → X tick gốc Excel → trống. Sheet này = năng lực làm IMA lý tưởng / Detailed Engineering. Tick ở đây nhưng không tick IMA bên DS_TK_ALL ⇒ có năng lực nhưng đang bận dự án khác.

Đếm theo 4 cấp: Leader → Senior → Junior → Fresher (từ cột Chức danh; tick Trainee ⇒ Fresher). Vị trí TBA không được tính. Màu cột lấy đúng màu khối discipline trên Sơ đồ tổ chức — đậm nhất ở Leader, nhạt dần đến Fresher.
2
Leader
23
Senior
27
Junior (gồm chức danh khác)
7
Fresher (tick Trainee hoặc chức danh Fresher)

TOÀN BỘ TỔ THIẾT KẾ · 59 người

DETAILED ENGINEERING (DE) — có thể làm dự án DE (tick IMA) · 18 người

CONSTRUCTION ENGINEERING (CE) — hiện làm dự án CE (chưa tick IMA) · 41 người

Fresh Engineer = nhân sự có tick ở cột Trainee/Trainnee. Số liệu tự cập nhật khi sửa DS_TK_ALL.
4
Tổng Fresh Engineer

Tổng nhân sự Tổ thiết kế
18
Năng lực làm IMA lý tưởng (DE – tick DS_TK_IMA)
11
Có thể ưu tiên IMA (tick IMA trong DS_TK_ALL)
10
Có năng lực nhưng bận dự án CE, không thể làm IMA
41
Nhân sự thiên về Construction Engineering
Biểu đồ ① – Khả năng huy động

Di chuột lên cột để xem danh sách tên nhân sự trong nhóm.

Biểu đồ ② – Phân bổ nguồn lực

Biểu đồ tự cập nhật theo tick trong DS_TK_ALL. "FTE" = tổng effort quy đổi.

Bộ môn lấy từ danh sách discipline của Sơ đồ tổ chức (tab 1) — không thể thêm mới ở đây; hãy thêm/sửa discipline ở tab 1. Ưu tiên: Cao Trung bình Thấp Bắt đầu/Kết thúc tự tính theo Thời gian dự kiến, nối tiếp nhau trong từng Bộ môn — chỉnh "Ngày bắt đầu nhóm" ở hàng tiêu đề mỗi Bộ môn để dời cả nhóm.
STTBộ mônTên Tool / Bảng tínhMục đích tính toánCơ sở tiêu chuẩnNền tảng đề xuấtĐầu raƯu tiênTh.gian dự kiếnBắt đầuKết thúcTiến độ (%)Ghi chú

1Line Sizing & Erosion VelocityTính đường kính ống, vận tốc xói mòn cho pha lỏng, hơi và đa phaAPI RP 14E (C-factor), TOTAL, Crane..Excel/ Hysys/ AppLine list, line sizing tuần01 Aug ' 2626 Sep ' 26

Màu cột theo Bộ môn tự đồng bộ với màu khối trên Sơ đồ tổ chức.
Chỉnh sửa trực tiếp mọi ô; bảng thống kê & chart tự cập nhật.
STTPhân nhómHạng mụcMô tả / Cấu hình đề xuấtĐVTSố lượngMục đích sử dụngGhi chú
1A. Thiết bị cá nhânLaptop làm việc (online)bộCông việc văn phòng, email, online, họpTất các các leader đều đã có laptop.
2A. Thiết bị cá nhânDesktop làm việc (online)bộĐã lập PYCC 70 bộ, dự tính về tháng 7 được 20 bộ để lắp.
3A. Thiết bị cá nhânDesktop làm việc (online)bộĐã lắp đặt cho tổ thiết kế
4A. Thiết bị cá nhânDesktop thiết kế (KHÔNG nối mạng)bộChạy phần mềm thiết kế nặng, bảo mật dữ liệuAir-gap, chỉ chạy SW thiết kế | Đã lập PYCC 70 bộ
5A. Thiết bị cá nhânMàn hình độ phân giải caocáiThiết kế CAD/3D độ chính xác cao02 màn hình/người thiết kế | Đã lập PYCC
6A. Thiết bị cá nhânMàn hình độ phân giải caocáiThiết kế CAD/3D độ chính xác caoĐã lắp đặt cho tổ thiết kế
7B. Thiết bị khảo sátMáy quét laser 3D (3D Laser Scanner)Nâng cấp thiết bị hiện có (Leica + Cyclone)bộKhảo sát brownfield, as-built 3D point cloudPOS đã có, cần NÂNG CẤP
8B. Thiết bị khảo sátDrone khảo sátUAV chụp ảnh/quét, có camera độ phân giải caobộKhảo sát kết cấu trên cao, topsidePhục vụ EPIC brownfield
9B. Thiết bị khảo sátLaptop khảo sát hiện trường (rugged)Laptop bền, pin lâu, xử lý point cloud cơ bảnbộThu thập & xử lý dữ liệu tại siteĐã lập PYCC, chờ có dự án mới triển khai mua.
10B. Thiết bị khảo sátThiết bị đo hiện trườngMáy đo khoảng cách laser, thước, total stationbộĐo kiểm tie-in, kích thước hiện trường—
TỔNG CỘNG331
Bộ môn lấy từ danh sách discipline của tab 1 (kèm mục "All disciplines").
STTBộ mônPhần mềmChức năng chínhNhà cung cấpTiêu chuẩn áp dụngSố lượngPOS hiện có / Mua mớiGhi chú
Process — 4 phần mềm
1Aspen HYSYS & FlarenetMô phỏng công nghệ steady/dynamicAspenTechGPSA, API RP 14EChỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
2FlareSimTính toán hệ flare, reliefSphera/AspenTechAPI 521/537Chỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
3PIPENETMô phỏng mạng đường ống, firewaterSunrise SystemsNFPA, API 14GChỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
4PHASTPhân tích hậu quả cháy nổ, phát tán khíDNVNFPAChỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
Piping — 4 phần mềm
5CAESAR IIPhân tích ứng suất ống (above water)Hexagon (PV Fab.)ASME B31.3v2014, cần nâng cấp
6AVEVA E3D / PDMSMô hình 3D piping/equipmentAVEVA—Chỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
7SmartPlant SpoolgenQuản lý & shopdrawing pipingHexagonASME B31.3v2020
8AutoCAD 3D-Autodesk—Đã ra phiếu 13/05/2026
Structural / Civil — 4 phần mềm
9SACSTính toán kết cấu biển (jacket/topside)BentleyAPI RP 2AXLCN, v2014
10STAAD.ProTính toán kết cấu onshore/moduleBentleyAISC 360, ASCE 7STAAD III cũ cần nâng cấp
11ANSYSPhân tích phi tuyến, mỏi chi tiếtANSYSAPI RP 2AChỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
12MOSESMô phỏng floating/transportBentley—XLHH
Mechanical — 4 phần mềm
13PVEliteTính toán bình áp lựcHexagon (PV Fab.)ASME VIII Div 1/2v2024/26
14ANSYS MechanicalFEA tĩnh/động, nozzle load, rung độngANSYSASME VIII, APIChỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
15HTRI / Aspen EDRThiết kế trao đổi nhiệtHTRI/AspenTechTEMA, API 660Chỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS

17INSTRUCALCTính RO, PSV, control valve sizing—ISA 75, API 520v9.0, Chỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
18SmartPlant Instrumentation (SPI)Quản lý CSDL instrument, loopHexagonISA 5.1Chỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
19AVEVA InstrumentQuản lý CSDL instrumentAVEVAISA 5.1Chỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
Pipeline — 5 phần mềm
20OrcaFlexPhân tích kết cấu biển/riser độngOrcinaAPI RP 2RD, DNV F201XLHH
21OFFpipeTính toán lay pipe—DNV-ST-F101v2019
22OLGAFlow assurance đa phaSchlumbergerAPI RP 14EChỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
23OrcaLayPhân tích lắp đặt ống biểnOrcinaDNV RP-F109/F110XLHH
24DNV toolTính toán đường ống theo DNVDNVDNV-ST-F101Chỉ khi có dự án EPC của POS
All disciplines — 8 phần mềm
25AutoCAD LTTạo & chỉnh sửa bản vẽ 2DAutodesk—v2017
26Navisworks 3D manageReview mô hình 3D, clash detectionAutodesk—Đã ra phiếu 13/05/2026
27Leica CycloneXử lý dữ liệu laser scan 3DLeica—Kèm máy 3D scanner
28Office 365Word, excel, pptMicrosoft-IT báo đang trình kí
29Snag ITChụp màn hình--IT báo dự kiến 17/6 giao về

Bộ môn chính lấy từ danh sách discipline của tab 1.
STTMã tiêu chuẩnPhiên bảnTổ chứcPhân loạiTên đầy đủBộ môn chínhBộ môn liên quanTrạng tháiMô tả phạm vi áp dụng
Process — 19 tiêu chuẩn
1GPSA Data Book2023 (15th Ed)GPSAProcess Systems Design & SimulationGPSA Engineering Data BookActiveThe definitive absolute reference manual for process engineers in the oil, gas, and petrochemical industries, covering thermodynamics, fluid flow, gas processing, and core sizing guidelines.
2API RP 14C2017 (8th Ed, R2023)APIProcess Systems Design & SimulationAnalysis, Design, Installation, and Testing of Safety Systems for Offshore Production FacilitiesInstrument & Control, SafetyActiveProvides a systematic methodology (SAFE chart) to analyze, design, and configure safety shutdown and process hazard containment systems on offshore platforms.
3API RP 14E1991 (5th Ed, R2019)APIProcess Systems Design & SimulationRecommended Practice for Design and Installation of Offshore Production Platform Piping SystemsActiveWidely utilized by process engineers for its foundational fluid velocity criteria, erosion velocity limits (C-factor formulas), and pressure drop calculations for multi-phase flows.
4API Std 520 Part I2020 (10th Ed)APIPressure Relief & Safety SystemsSizing, Selection, and Sizing of Pressure-Relieving DevicesActiveThe global baseline standard for process engineers to perform relief load calculations, vapor/liquid expansion sizing, and select correct relief valve orifices.
5API Std 520 Part II2020 (7th Ed)APIPressure Relief & Safety SystemsInstallation of Pressure-Relieving DevicesActiveGoverns the critical inlet and outlet hydraulics, 3% pressure drop rules, and configuration of piping attached to relief valves to prevent chattering.
6API Std 5212020 (7th Ed)APIPressure Relief & Safety SystemsPressure-relieving and Depressuring SystemsActiveCovers the process design of flare headers, knock-out drums, emergency depressurization (blowdown) networks, radiation calculations, and flare sizing criteria.
7API Std 5372017 (3rd Ed, R2022)APIPressure Relief & Safety SystemsFlare Details for Petroleum, Petrochemical, and Natural Gas IndustriesActiveOutlines process requirements and mechanical guidelines for the selection, operation, and thermal/hydraulic validation of open flare systems.
8ASME BPVC Sec VIII D12025ASMEProcess Equipment SpecificationsRules for Construction of Pressure Vessels - Division 1Mechanical, Piping, QA/QC, StructureActiveMandatory code governing the mechanical boundaries, wall thickness, and design pressures for process pressure vessels, separators, and columns.
9ASME BPVC Sec VIII D22025ASMEProcess Equipment SpecificationsRules for Construction of Pressure Vessels - Alternative RulesMechanical, Piping, QA/QC, StructureActiveProvides advanced, rigorous design-by-analysis rules allowing lower safety factors and optimized wall thicknesses for high-pressure process applications.
10API Std 6502020 (13th Ed)APIProcess Equipment SpecificationsWelded Tanks for Oil StorageMechanicalActiveSpecifies structural and process sizing configurations, materials, and fabrication rules for vertical, cylindrical, aboveground, atmospheric storage tanks.
11API Std 6202013 (12th Ed, R2021)APIProcess Equipment SpecificationsDesign and Construction of Large, Welded, Low-pressure Storage TanksActiveGoverns the design of large tanks subjected to low positive internal gas pressures (up to 15 psig), typically utilized for LNG or volatile intermediate process liquids.
12API Std 6602020 (10th Ed)APIProcess Equipment SpecificationsShell-and-tube Heat ExchangersMechanicalActiveSupplements ASME rules by establishing process design constraints, thermal-hydraulic considerations, and fouling factor margins for shell-and-tube exchangers.
13TEMA Standards2019 (10th Ed)TEMAProcess Equipment SpecificationsStandards of the Tubular Exchanger Manufacturers AssociationMechanicalActiveThe industry-standard geometric nomenclature, mechanical design rules, and thermal criteria for specifying Class R (Refinery), Class C (Chemical), and Class B process heat exchangers.
14API Std 6102021 (12th Ed)APIProcess Equipment SpecificationsCentrifugal Pumps for Petroleum, Petrochemical, and Natural Gas IndustriesMechanicalActiveDefines continuous-duty technical requirements, head/flow characteristics, and process margins for rotating equipment handling flammable hydrocarbons.
15API Std 5602016 (5th Ed, R2022)APIProcess Equipment SpecificationsFired Heaters for General Refinery ServiceActiveGoverns the thermal design efficiency, combustion air distribution, tube sizing, and fluid heat flux criteria for refinery furnace systems.
16API 5102022 (11th Ed)APIFabrication, Inspection & TestingPressure Vessel Inspection Code: In-service Inspection, Rating, Repair, and AlterationActiveThe ultimate pressure equipment integrity code managing post-fabrication in-service inspections, corrosion rate calculations, and remaining life evaluations.
17API 6532014 (5th Ed, Addendum 2021)APIFabrication, Inspection & TestingTank Inspection, Repair, Alteration, and ReconstructionActiveRegulates structural fitness-for-service, floor settlement monitoring, and wall thickness inspection criteria for active oil storage assets.
18API RP 5722021 (4th Ed)APIFabrication, Inspection & TestingInspection Practices for Pressure VesselsActiveProvides comprehensive instructions for inspectors and process engineers regarding typical degradation mechanisms, internal trays, and demister pad checkouts.
19ASME BPVC Sec V2025ASMEFabrication, Inspection & TestingNondestructive ExaminationMechanical, Piping, QA/QC, StructureActiveMandated for execution guidelines regarding visual, ultrasonic, radiographic, and bubble-leak tests of manufactured chemical process units.
Piping — 21 tiêu chuẩn
20ASME B31.32024ASMEDesign & Dimensional SpecificationsProcess PipingProcessActiveThe overarching standard governing the design, materials, fabrication, assembly, erection, examination, and testing of process piping systems in petroleum refineries, chemical, pharmaceutical, and related plants.
21ASME B36.10M2022ASMEDesign & Dimensional SpecificationsWelded and Seamless Wrought Steel PipeActiveStandardizes dimensions, outside diameters (OD), and schedule (wall thickness) for carbon and alloy steel pipes.
22ASME B36.19M2022ASMEDesign & Dimensional SpecificationsWelded and Seamless Wrought Stainless Steel PipeActiveStandardizes dimensions and wall thickness specifically for stainless steel pipes (identified by an 'S' suffix, e.g., Sch 10S, 40S).
23API Spec 5L2026 (47th Ed)APIDesign & Dimensional SpecificationsSpecification for Line PipePipeline / SubseaActiveLatest edition published June 2, 2026. Specifies requirements for the manufacture of seamless and welded steel pipes for pipeline transportation systems in the petroleum and natural gas industries, including strict requirements for CO2 pipelines.
24ASME B16.52025ASMEFlanges, Valves & Piping ComponentsPipe Flanges and Flanged Fittings: NPS 1/2 through NPS 24 Metric/Inch StandardActiveDimensional, material, testing, and pressure-temperature rating standard for pipe flanges and flanged fittings (Class 150 to 2500).
25ASME B16.472025ASMEFlanges, Valves & Piping ComponentsLarge Diameter Steel Flanges: NPS 26 through NPS 60 Metric/Inch StandardActiveApplies to large diameter steel flanges from NPS 26 through NPS 60, covering Series A and Series B.
26ASME B16.92024ASMEFlanges, Valves & Piping ComponentsFactory-Made Wrought Buttwelding FittingsActiveCovers overall dimensions, tolerances, ratings, testing, and markings for factory-made wrought buttwelding fittings (elbows, tees, reducers, etc.).
27ASME B16.112021ASMEFlanges, Valves & Piping ComponentsForged Fittings, Socket-Welding and ThreadedActiveCovers ratings, dimensions, tolerances, marking and material requirements for forged fittings, both socket-welding and threaded (Class 2000, 3000, 6000, 9000).
28ASME B16.202023ASMEFlanges, Valves & Piping ComponentsMetallic Gaskets for Pipe FlangesActiveComprehensive standard covering materials, dimensions, and tolerances for metallic ring-joint, spiral-wound, and grooved gaskets.
29ASME B16.212021ASMEFlanges, Valves & Piping ComponentsNonmetallic Flat Gaskets for Pipe FlangesActiveCovers types, sizes, materials, and dimensions of nonmetallic flat gaskets for flanged joints.
30ASME B16.342025ASMEFlanges, Valves & Piping ComponentsValves—Flanged, Threaded, and Welding EndProcessActiveFoundational standard covering pressure-temperature ratings, dimensions, tolerances, materials, nondestructive examination requirements, and testing for industrial valves.
31API Spec 6D2021 (25th Ed)APIFlanges, Valves & Piping ComponentsSpecification for ValvesActivePrimary standard for pipeline valves (gate, plug, ball, and check valves) used in petroleum and natural gas industries.
32API Std 5982023 (11th Ed)APIFlanges, Valves & Piping ComponentsValve Inspection and TestingActiveCovers inspection, examination, supplementary examinations, and pressure test (leakage test) requirements for valves.
33ASME BPVC Sec IX2025ASMEFabrication, Welding & ErectionWelding, Brazing, and Fusing QualificationsMechanical, QA/QC, StructureActiveMandatory requirements for the qualification of welders, welding operators, and welding procedures (WPS, PQR, WPQ) under the Boiler and Pressure Vessel Code.
34AWS D10.10/D10.10M2021AWSFabrication, Welding & ErectionRecommended Practices for Local Heating of Welds in Piping and TubingMechanical, QA/QC, StructureActiveProvides recommended practices for local heating of welds in piping (Preheat and Post-Weld Heat Treatment - PWHT) to relieve residual stress.
35API 5702024 (5th Ed)APIInspection, Testing & MaintenancePiping Inspection Code: In-service Inspection, Rating, Repair, and Alteration of Piping SystemsActiveSupreme piping inspection code governing in-service inspection, condition rating, repair, and alteration of metallic and FRP piping systems.
36API RP 5742024 (5th Ed)APIInspection, Testing & MaintenanceInspection Practices for Piping System ComponentsActiveRecommended practices for the inspection of piping system components, valves, and fittings, including thickness measurement methods.
37API RP 5772020APIInspection, Testing & MaintenanceWelding Processes, Inspection, and MetallurgyActiveProvides guidance on welding processes, inspection methodologies, and metallurgy to resolve welding issues in piping fabrication.
38API RP 5782023 (4th Ed)APIInspection, Testing & MaintenanceMaterial Verification Program for New and Existing Alloy Piping SystemsActiveProvides guidelines for a material and quality assurance system to verify the composition of alloy components (PMI - Positive Material Identification).
39ASME BPVC Sec V2025ASMEInspection, Testing & MaintenanceNondestructive ExaminationMechanical, QA/QC, StructureActiveContains requirements and methods for nondestructive examination (NDE/NDT) referenced and required by other ASME construction codes (RT, UT, MT, PT).
40ASNT SNT-TC-1A2024ASNTInspection, Testing & MaintenancePersonnel Qualification and Certification in Nondestructive TestingMechanical, QA/QC, StructureActiveProvides guidelines for employers to establish in-house certification programs for nondestructive testing (NDT) personnel (Levels I, II, and III).
Structural / Civil — 20 tiêu chuẩn
41AISC 3602022AISCDesign SpecificationsSpecification for Structural Steel BuildingsActiveThe fundamental standard for the design, fabrication, and erection of structural steel buildings, widely adopted as the base design code for onshore oil & gas plants and refinery steel modules.
42AISC 3032022AISCDesign SpecificationsCode of Standard Practice for Steel Buildings and BridgesActiveGoverns the practices and trade boundaries for the design, fabrication, and erection of structural steel, outlining legal and technical conventions between owners, engineers, and fabricators.
43API RP 2A-WSD2014 (22nd Ed, R2020)APIOffshore Structural DesignRecommended Practice for Planning, Designing and Constructing Fixed Offshore Platforms—Working Stress DesignActiveThe premier oil & gas standard for the planning, engineering design, and construction of fixed steel offshore jacket platforms using Working Stress Design principles.
44API RP 2A-LRFD2019 (2nd Ed)APIOffshore Structural DesignPlanning, Designing, and Constructing Fixed Offshore Platforms—Load and Resistance Factor DesignActiveApplies limit-state, probabilistic Load and Resistance Factor Design methodology for offshore structural steel designs.
45ASCE/SEI 72022ASCEDesign SpecificationsMinimum Design Loads and Associated Criteria for Buildings and Other StructuresActiveProvides comprehensive requirements for dead, live, soil, flood, tsunami, wind, snow, rain, ice, and earthquake loads, utilized alongside AISC for plant structural engineering.
46API Bul 2V2022 (4th Ed)APIOffshore Structural DesignDesign of Flat Plate StructuresActiveProvides guidance on the design of steel flat plate structures for offshore platforms, structural components, and deck modules under various loading conditions.
47ASTM A36/A36M2019ASTMMaterials & PlatesStandard Specification for Carbon Structural SteelActiveStandard specification covering carbon steel shapes, plates, and bars of structural quality for use in riveted, bolted, or welded construction of structures.
48ASTM A572/A572M2021ASTMMaterials & PlatesStandard Specification for High-Strength Low-Alloy Columbium-Vanadium Structural SteelActiveCovers five grades of high-strength low-alloy structural steel shapes, plates, sheet piling, and bars, commonly used for high-load heavy steel structures.
49ASTM A992/A992M2022ASTMMaterials & PlatesStandard Specification for Structural Steel ShapesActiveThe dominant US specification for wide-flange shapes (I-beams/H-beams) used in structural steel frameworks and structural modules.
50API Spec 2W2019 (6th Ed, R2024)APIMaterials & PlatesSpecification for Steel Plates for Offshore Structures, Produced by Thermo-Mechanical Control Processing (TMCP)ActiveCovers TMCP steel plates for offshore structures intended for critical, fracture-critical, and low-temperature applications where enhanced weldability and toughness are vital.
51AWS D1.1/D1.1M2025AWSFabrication & WeldingStructural Welding Code—SteelMechanical, Piping, QA/QCActiveThe absolute reference code for structural steel welding. Covers qualification of procedures (WPS/PQR), personnel, fabrication details, and inspection criteria for steel structures >3mm thick.
52AWS D1.8/D1.8M2021AWSFabrication & WeldingStructural Welding Code—Seismic SupplementMechanical, Piping, QA/QCActiveSupplements AWS D1.1 with additional controls for steel structural connections subjected to high seismic loads or repetitive fatigue stresses in energy infrastructure.
53API RP 2Z2010 (4th Ed, R2021)APIFabrication & WeldingRecommended Practice for Prequalification Program for Offshore Structure MaterialsActiveOutlines prequalification programs for welding and steel plate testing to ensure adequate fracture toughness (CTOD testing) in harsh marine environments.
54AWS D1.1 (Clause 8)2025AWSInspection & TestingInspection - Structural Welding CodeMechanical, Piping, QA/QCActiveClause 8 of AWS D1.1 defines the specific acceptance criteria for Visual Inspection (VT), Ultrasonic Testing (UT), and Radiographic Testing (RT) of structural structural welds.
55ASME BPVC Sec V2025ASMEInspection & TestingNondestructive ExaminationMechanical, Piping, QA/QCActiveReferenced for technical methodology on non-destructive examinations (NDT), including Magnetic Particle (MT) and Liquid Penetrant (PT) applicable to structural fabrications.
56ASTM E7092021ASTMInspection & TestingStandard Guide for Magnetic Particle TestingMechanical, Piping, QA/QCActiveDetailed technical guideline for executing magnetic particle examination on structural steel welds and lifting lugs to identify surface/subsurface defects.
57ASTM E165/E165M2023ASTMInspection & TestingStandard Practice for Liquid Penetrant Testing for General IndustryMechanical, Piping, QA/QCActiveGoverns the standard practice for dye penetrant testing on structural steel assemblies and non-magnetic attachment welds.
58AISC 360 (Chapter M)2022AISCErection & AssemblyFabrication and Erection RequirementsActiveChapter M prescribes exact criteria for structural steel erection, alignment tolerances, anchoring, field bolting, and temporary bracing stability during erection.
59AISC Code of Practice (Sec 7)2022AISCErection & AssemblyErection - Field Assembly PracticesActiveSection 7 outlines field assembly practices, clarifying tolerances for column plumbness, elevation, and structural positioning boundaries.
60API RP 2A-WSD (Section 12)2014 (R2020)APIErection & AssemblyInstallation of Offshore StructuresActiveSection 12 focuses extensively on field operations, pile driving, lifting, launching, leveling, and securing offshore jacket structural steel elements.
Mechanical — 21 tiêu chuẩn
61ASME BPVC Sec VIII Div 12025 EditionASMEStatic Equipment DesignRules for Construction of Pressure Vessels - Division 1Piping, Process, QA/QC, StructureActiveProvides mandatory requirements for the design, fabrication, inspection, and testing of pressure vessels operating above 15 psig. Globally applied for separators, towers, and drums.
62ASME BPVC Sec VIII Div 22025 EditionASMEStatic Equipment DesignRules for Construction of Pressure Vessels - Alternative RulesPiping, Process, QA/QC, StructureActiveApplies a rigorous 'Design-by-Analysis' methodology for higher-pressure or more critical refinery and offshore platform process vessels, allowing optimized wall thicknesses.
63ASME BPVC Sec I2025 EditionASMEStatic Equipment DesignRules for Construction of Power BoilersActiveCovers the essential rules for the design, fabrication, and assembly of high-pressure steam power boilers and heat recovery steam generators (HRSG) used in plant utilities.
64API Std 6602020 (10th Ed)APIStatic Equipment DesignShell-and-tube Heat ExchangersProcessActiveEstablishes mechanical and standard process constraints for shell-and-tube heat exchangers, supplementing ASME Section VIII criteria for refinery service.
65API Std 6612018 (7th Ed, R2024)APIStatic Equipment DesignPetroleum, Petrochemical, and Natural Gas Industries—Air-cooled Heat ExchangersActiveReaffirmed in 2024. Covers the engineering design, material verification, manufacturing, and checkout testing for ambient air-cooled heat exchangers (fin-fans) on modules.
66API Std 5602016 (5th Ed, R2022)APIStatic Equipment DesignFired Heaters for General Refinery ServiceActiveGoverns thermal configurations, coil calculations, burner configurations, and casing designs for industrial furnaces and fired heaters.
67TEMA Standards2019 (10th Ed)TEMAStatic Equipment DesignStandards of the Tubular Exchanger Manufacturers AssociationProcessActiveDefines geometric, manufacturing limits, thermal parameters, and structural rules for Class R (Refinery), Class C (Chemical), and Class B process heat exchangers.
68API Std 6502020 (13th Ed)APIStatic Equipment DesignWelded Tanks for Oil StorageProcessActiveProvides parameters for design, manufacturing, erection, and hydro-testing of vertical aboveground cylindrical oil storage tanks (atmospheric pressure).
69API Std 6202013 (12th Ed, R2021)APIStatic Equipment DesignDesign and Construction of Large, Welded, Low-pressure Storage TanksActiveGoverns large welded tanks subjected to small positive internal gas pressures (up to 15 psig), common in cryogenic LNG or refrigerated intermediate processing.
70API Std 6102021 (12th Ed)APIRotating Equipment DesignCentrifugal Pumps for Petroleum, Petrochemical, and Natural Gas IndustriesProcessActiveThe definitive standard specifying heavy-duty continuous criteria for process centrifugal pumps handling critical hydrocarbon products.
71API Std 6742010 (3rd Ed, R2016/2023)APIRotating Equipment DesignPositive Displacement Pumps—ReciprocatingActiveSpecifies minimum criteria for reciprocating positive displacement pumps (plunger/piston) for high-pressure chemical injection or utility dosing.
72API Std 6762022 (4th Ed)APIRotating Equipment DesignPositive Displacement Pumps—RotaryActiveCovers rotary positive displacement pumps (screw, gear, vane pumps) utilized for heavy crude viscous fluid transfers on platforms and onshore plants.
73API Std 6822014 (4th Ed)APIRotating Equipment DesignPumps—Shaft Sealing Systems for Centrifugal and Rotary PumpsActiveGoverns severe process parameters for mechanical seals and supply support systems to strictly eliminate fugitive hazardous emissions.
74API Std 6172022 (9th Ed)APIRotating Equipment DesignAxial and Centrifugal Compressors and Expander-compressorsActiveSpecifies minimum engineering design, dynamic balancing, and test parameters for high-speed centrifugal gas compressors in process plants.
75API Std 6182007 (5th Ed, R2016/2024)APIRotating Equipment DesignReciprocating Compressors for Petroleum, Petrochemical, and Natural Gas IndustriesActiveReaffirmed with updates. Governs slow-speed and high-speed reciprocating gas compression units, heavily focusing on pulsation and vibration controls.
76API Std 6122020 (8th Ed)APIRotating Equipment DesignPetroleum, Petrochemical, and Natural Gas Industries—Steam Turbines—Special-purpose ApplicationsActiveCovers the design, casing, rotor dynamics, and safety testing for critical steam turbines used as equipment drivers in process plants.
77API 5102022 (11th Ed)APIInspection, Fabrication & TestingPressure Vessel Inspection Code: In-service Inspection, Rating, Repair, and AlterationActiveThe post-fabrication and operational inspection code for process equipment. Directs remaining life, structural repair, and integrity limits.
78API 6532014 (5th Ed, Addendum 2021)APIInspection, Fabrication & TestingTank Inspection, Repair, Alteration, and ReconstructionActiveRegulates fitness-for-service checkouts, foundation settlements, and plate repair boundaries for working aboveground storage tanks.
79ASME BPVC Sec V2025 EditionASMEInspection, Fabrication & TestingNondestructive ExaminationPiping, QA/QC, StructureActiveDefines performance parameters for RT, UT, MT, PT and leak testing during equipment manufacturing and field tie-ins.
80PIP RESP0022019PIPErection, Foundation & AssemblyDesign and Fabrication of Machinery FoundationsActiveProcess Industry Practices standard detailing the exact civil/mechanical engineering interfaces, anchor bolting, and grouting parameters for large rotating machinery.
81API RP 6862009 (2nd Ed, R2021)APIErection, Foundation & AssemblyRecommended Practice for Machinery Installation and Installation DesignActiveThe paramount oil & gas specification for machinery installation design, field piping alignment alignment checks, leveling, and pre-commissioning checkouts.
Electrical — 20 tiêu chuẩn
82NFPA 70 (NEC)2026 EditionNFPAArea Classification & SafetyNational Electrical CodeActiveThe premier national standard governing safe electrical installations. Revisions include robust safety modifications for energy storage systems and alternative fuels within classified industrial sectors.
83NFPA 4972024 EditionNFPAArea Classification & SafetyRecommended Practice for the Classification of Flammable Liquids, Gases, or Vapors and of Hazardous (Classified) Locations for Electrical Installations in Chemical Process AreasActiveProvides parameters to systematically evaluate process areas and classify Class I hazardous locations, determining proper electrical explosion-proof configurations.
84API RP 5002023 (4th Ed)APIArea Classification & SafetyRecommended Practice for Classification of Locations for Electrical Installations at Petroleum Facilities Classified as Class I, Division 1 and Division 2ActiveEstablishes specific guidelines for evaluating and mapping Division-based hazardous zones across upstream, midstream, and downstream refinery oil & gas complexes.
85API RP 5052018 (2nd Ed, R2024)APIArea Classification & SafetyRecommended Practice for Classification of Locations for Electrical Installations at Petroleum Facilities Classified as Class I, Zone 0, Zone 1, and Zone 2ActiveReaffirmed with updates in 2024. Dictates the alternative three-zone international mapping system for classifying hazardous gas and vapor release environments.
86NFPA 70E2024 EditionNFPAArea Classification & SafetyStandard for Electrical Safety in the WorkplaceActiveEstablishes mandatory protocols to protect personnel from arc flash boundaries, shock hazards, and dictates Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) specifications during operation and checkout.
87API RP 14F2023 (6th Ed)APIOffshore Power Systems DesignRecommended Practice for Design and Installation of Electrical Systems for Fixed and Floating Offshore Petroleum Facilities for Unclassified and Class I, Division 1 and Division 2 LocationsActiveThe baseline standard for electrical engineering on offshore rigs and jackets, addressing high-salinity and vibration-prone marine installation issues under the Division format.
88API RP 14FZ2023 (3rd Ed)APIOffshore Power Systems DesignRecommended Practice for Design and Installation of Electrical Systems for Fixed and Floating Offshore Petroleum Facilities for Unclassified and Class I, Zone 0, Zone 1, and Zone 2 LocationsActiveGoverns offshore facility electrical design, configuration, and cable distribution management utilizing the Zone classification approach.
89IEEE Std 45.12021 EditionIEEEOffshore Power Systems DesignRecommended Practice for Electrical Installations on Shipboard—DesignActiveCommonly referenced during the design of Floating Production Storage and Offloading (FPSO) vessels and specialized marine platform modules.
90IEEE Std 3001.112022 EditionIEEEPower Systems Design & AnalysisRecommended Practice for Testing and Commissioning of Industrial and Commercial Power SystemsActivePart of the modernized IEEE 3000 series (replacing old Color Books), defining strict parameters for industrial grid stability, load flow studies, and power quality validation.
91IEEE Std 15842018 (2nd Ed, R2024)IEEEPower Systems Design & AnalysisGuide for Performing Arc-Flash Hazard CalculationsActiveReaffirmed 2024. Outlines the mandatory mathematical models and simulation boundaries required to evaluate potential arc flash incident energy levels across plant switchgear.
92IEEE Std 1422007 (R2023)IEEEPower Systems Design & AnalysisRecommended Practice for Grounding of Industrial and Commercial Power Systems (Green Book)ActiveReaffirmed in 2023. Provides critical guidelines for system grounding, equipment bonding, and static charge dissipation rules in petrochemical facilities.
93UL 508A2022 EditionULEquipment Manufacturing SpecsStandard for Industrial Control PanelsActiveGoverns the manufacturing, internal wiring selection, short-circuit current ratings (SCCR), and safety listings for industrial custom control panels and marshalling boxes.
94UL 1212012019 (9th Ed, R2023)ULEquipment Manufacturing SpecsNonincendive Electrical Equipment for Use in Class I and II, Division 2 and Class III, Divisions 1 and 2 Hazardous (Classified) LocationsInstrument & ControlActiveThe critical standard validating that electrical assemblies will not cause ignition under normal operating conditions within Division 2 areas.
95NEMA ICS 62020 EditionNEMAEquipment Manufacturing SpecsIndustrial Control and Systems: EnclosuresActiveDefines standard ingress protection parameters, structural thresholds, and corrosion-resistance scales for NEMA-rated enclosures (e.g., NEMA 4X, NEMA 7 for explosion-proof).
96NEMA VE 12017 (R2022)NEMAEquipment Manufacturing SpecsMetal Cable Tray SystemsActiveCovers manufacturing thresholds, load capacity profiles, and deflection boundaries for metallic ladder-type cable trays utilized for high-density plant cabling.
97NECA 12024 EditionNECAInstallation & Site ErectionStandard for Good Workmanship in Electrical ConstructionActiveDefines the benchmark criteria for clear, structured, and compliant electrical installation practices across global construction sites.
98NEMA VE 22022 EditionNEMAInstallation & Site ErectionCable Tray Installation GuidelinesActiveThe definitive field manual governing cable tray installation, structural support spacing, grounding bonds, and thermal expansion joint setups.
99NETA ATS2025 EditionNETAInspection, Testing & CommissioningStandard for Acceptance Testing Specifications for Electrical Power Equipment and SystemsActiveThe supreme field reference manual prescribing mandatory insulation resistance (Megger), high-potential (Hi-Pot), and contact resistance testing bounds before plant energization.
100NETA MTS2023 EditionNETAInspection, Testing & CommissioningStandard for Maintenance Testing Specifications for Electrical Power Equipment and SystemsActiveRegulates preventive diagnostic testing procedures and degradation evaluation limits for energized industrial electrical components.
101IEEE Std 4002023 EditionIEEEInspection, Testing & CommissioningGuide for Field Testing and Evaluation of the Insulation of Shielded Power Cable Systems Rated 5 kV and AboveActiveOutlines standard technical methodology for VLF (Very Low Frequency) and partial discharge testing of medium-voltage plant power cables.
Instrument & Telecom — 20 tiêu chuẩn
102ISA-5.12022 EditionISAProcess Measurement & SpecsInstrumentation Symbols and IdentificationActiveThe universal foundation code for P&IDs, specifying standard nomenclature, lettering tags, and graphic symbols used for identifying process instruments and control loops.
103API RP 5512016 (R2022)APIProcess Measurement & SpecsProcess Measurement InstrumentationActiveReaffirmed 2022. Provides extensive guidelines for selecting, scaling, and location criteria of process instruments measuring pressure, level, temperature, and fluid flow in refineries.
104ASME MFC-3M2004 (R2022)ASMEProcess Measurement & SpecsMeasurement of Fluid Flow in Pipes Using Orifice, Nozzle, and VenturiActiveGoverns geometric dimensions, discharge coefficients, and differential pressure calculation metrics for primary flow elements like orifice plates.
105API MPMS Ch. 5.62013 (R2020)APIProcess Measurement & SpecsManual of Petroleum Measurement Standards - Measurement of Liquid Hydrocarbons by Coriolis MetersActiveSpecifies precision parameters, piping conditions, and validation requirements for custody-transfer Coriolis mass flowmeters handling liquids.
106ANSI/ISA-84.00.012004 (IEC 61511 Mod)ISAControl & Safety SystemsFunctional Safety: Safety Instrumented Systems for the Process Industry SectorActiveThe paramount US functional safety standard. Prescribes the Safety Life Cycle framework, Safety Integrity Level (SIL) allocation, and design rules for emergency shutdown systems (ESD).
107API RP 554 Part 12021 (2nd Ed)APIControl & Safety SystemsProcess Control Systems: Part 1 - Process Control Systems Functions and Functional Specification DevelopmentActiveOutlines high-level functional parameters, system integration boundaries, and specification guidelines for Distributed Control Systems (DCS) and PLCs.
108API RP 554 Part 22021 (2nd Ed)APIControl & Safety SystemsProcess Control Systems: Part 2 - Process Control System DesignActiveAddresses detailed software, hardware, system topology architectures, and dual-redundancy guidelines for control networks.
109API RP 5521994 (R2021)APIControl & Safety SystemsTransmission SystemsActiveGoverns the routing, noise mitigation, shielding, and signal isolation rules for pneumatic, analog (4-20mA), digital, and fiber-optic instrument loops.
110ISA-18.22016 EditionISAControl & Safety SystemsManagement of Alarm Systems for the Process IndustriesActiveDefines the absolute workflow criteria for alarm lifecycle management, rationalization metrics, priority filtering, and avoiding alarm flooding in control rooms.
111API RP 14C2017 (R2023)APIControl & Safety SystemsAnalysis, Design, Installation, and Testing of Safety Systems for Offshore Production FacilitiesProcess, SafetyActiveExtensively utilized by I&C engineers to construct Safety Analysis Function Evaluation (SAFE) charts and implement primary offshore shutdown logic.
112API RP 5532012 (R2021)APIValves & Final ElementsRefinery Valves and Accessories for Control and Safety Instrumented SystemsActiveOutlines strict criteria for severe-service control valves, isolating blocks, and Emergency Shutdown Valves (ESV/BDV) accessories used in hazardous loops.
113ISA-75.01.012012 (R2017)ISAValves & Final ElementsFlow Equations for Control ValvesActiveThe mathematical standard containing the definitive flow sizing equations for control valves handling compressible vapors and incompressible liquids.
114ISA-75.19.012013 (R2018)ISAValves & Final ElementsHydrostatic Testing of Control ValvesActiveEstablishes structural inspection and shell/seat pressure leakage testing bounds specifically for manufactured control valves.
115ASME B16.342025 EditionASMEValves & Final ElementsValves—Flanged, Threaded, and Welding EndPiping, ProcessActiveMandated to govern pressure-temperature limits, casting wall thicknesses, and material selection criteria for control valve bodies.
116NFPA 722025/2026 EditionNFPAFire, Gas & Classified AreasNational Fire Alarm and Signaling CodeSafetyActiveThe core reference code governing the configuration, loop circuit wiring integrity, and system diagnostics for industrial Fire and Gas (F&G) networks.
117API RP 14G2019 EditionAPIFire, Gas & Classified AreasRecommended Practice for Fire Prevention and Control on Open-type Offshore Production PlatformsSafetyActiveDirects the specific layout, logic zones, and distribution mapping of flame, smoke, combustible gas, and toxic gas detectors across offshore production modules.
118UL 1212012019 (R2023)ULFire, Gas & Classified AreasNonincendive Electrical Equipment for Use in Class I and II, Division 2 Hazardous LocationsElectricalActiveEssential testing certification standard for field electronic instruments, transmitters, and solenoids operating safely within Division 2 areas without explosion enclosures.
119PIP INT01012021 EditionPIPInstallation & InspectionInstrumentation Installation DetailsActiveProcess Industry Practices standard presenting explicit mechanical installation details, typical instrument manifold piping, and support mounting hook-ups.
120ISA-RP60.11990 EditionISAInstallation & InspectionControl Center FacilitiesActiveProvides structural layout, climate controls, operator console geometry, and cabling panel termination setups for control buildings.
121ASME BPVC Sec V2025 EditionASMEInstallation & InspectionNondestructive ExaminationMechanical, Piping, QA/QC, StructureActiveReferenced for radiography (RT) and dye penetrant (PT) execution methods on high-pressure instrument piping, impulse line welds, and socket joints.
Pipeline — 34 tiêu chuẩn
122ASME B31.42022 EditionASMEPipeline Design & SystemsPipeline Transportation Systems for Liquids and SlurriesPiping, ProcessActiveThe primary US code governing the design, materials, construction, assembly, inspection, and testing of onshore pipeline systems transporting liquid hydrocarbons and slurries.
123ASME B31.82022 EditionASMEPipeline Design & SystemsGas Transmission and Distribution Piping SystemsPiping, ProcessActiveThe definitive US code covering design, fabrication, installation, inspection, testing, and safety aspects of gas transmission lines and distribution networks.
124API RP 11112015 (R2021)APIPipeline Design & SystemsDesign, Construction, Operation, and Maintenance of Offshore Hydrocarbon PipelinesActiveReaffirmed 2021. Establishes the standard limit-state criteria, combined load calculations, hydrostatic testing parameters, and design bounds for offshore/subsea steel pipelines.
125ISO 136232017 EditionISOPipeline Design & SystemsPetroleum and natural gas industries — Pipeline transportation systemsActiveThe global international standard establishing functional requirements for pipeline systems used for transportation in the petroleum and natural gas industries. Deeply aligned with ASME B31 codes.
126API RP 2RD2020 (2nd Ed)APIPipeline Design & SystemsDynamic Risers for Floating Production SystemsActiveGoverns severe dynamic performance, structural limitations, and design criteria for subsea riser elements interfacing between floating host units and sea floor assets.
127API Spec 5L2026 (47th Ed)APILine Pipes & MaterialsSpecification for Line PipePipingActiveLatest version published June 2, 2026. The absolute global manufacturing standard specifying grades, mechanical criteria, and chemistry tolerances for seamless and welded line pipes (including strict requirements for hydrogen and carbon dioxide carriers).
128ISO 31832019 EditionISOLine Pipes & MaterialsPetroleum and natural gas industries — Steel pipe for pipeline transportation systemsActiveInternational standard establishing technical delivery conditions for steel line pipes, maintaining harmonic parity with API Spec 5L product specification levels (PSL 1 and PSL 2).
129ASTM A106/A106M2019 EditionASTMLine Pipes & MaterialsStandard Specification for Seamless Carbon Steel Pipe for High-Temperature ServiceActiveCovers seamless carbon steel pipe for high-temperature and high-pressure gathering networks or process tie-ins.
130ASTM A333/A333M2021 EditionASTMLine Pipes & MaterialsStandard Specification for Seamless and Welded Steel Pipe for Low-Temperature ServiceActiveSpecifies structural and impact toughness requirements for seamless and welded steel pipes used in sub-zero environments or cold climates.
131ISO 21809-12018 EditionISOLine Pipes & MaterialsExternal coatings for buried or submerged pipelines — Part 1: Polyolefin coatings (3-layer PE and 3-layer PP)ActiveThe standard governing manufacturing, application, and test parameters of three-layer polyethylene (3LPE) and three-layer polypropylene (3LPP) external anti-corrosion protection coatings.
132API Std 11042021 (22nd Ed)APIConstruction & InstallationWelding of Pipelines and Related FacilitiesActiveThe paramount US welding standard governing gas and arc welding of butt and fillet welds in carbon and low-alloy steel pipelines. Covers WPS/PQR, welder qualifications, and NDT acceptance boundaries.
133ISO 138472013 EditionISOConstruction & InstallationPetroleum and natural gas industries — Pipeline transportation systems — Welding of pipelinesActiveSpecifies requirements for the execution, testing, and documentation of welding operations for pipeline systems, complementing international project scopes.
134API RP 11022007 (R2017)APIConstruction & InstallationSteel Pipelines Crossing Railroads and HighwaysActiveProvides standard cross-sectional stress calculation methods and structural layout requirements for buried pipelines routed underneath highway and rail infrastructure.
135ISO 147232009 EditionISOConstruction & InstallationPetroleum and natural gas industries — Pipeline transportation systems — Subsea pipeline valvesActiveSpecifies essential requirements and manufacturing test boundaries for subsea pipeline valves (gate, ball, check types) integrated into pipeline networks.
136API RP 11102013 (R2018)APIInspection, Testing & IntegrityPressure Testing of Steel Pipelines for the Transportation of Gas, Petroleum Gas, Hazardous Liquids, Highly Volatile Liquids, or Carbon DioxideActiveEstablishes critical safety guidelines, pressure test duration, and leakage hold-time parameters during hydro-testing operations.
137API Std 11632021 (3rd Ed)APIInspection, Testing & IntegrityIn-line Inspection Systems QualificationActiveGoverns systems qualification, data analysis verification, tool accuracy tolerances, and reporting metrics for Intelligent Pigging operations (ILI tools).
138ASME B31.8S2022 EditionASMEInspection, Testing & IntegrityManaging System Integrity of Gas PipelinesPiping, ProcessActivePrescribes comprehensive integrity management program frameworks, risk assessments, threat classification, and remediation parameters for active gas transmission assets.
139ISO 15589-12015 EditionISOInspection, Testing & IntegrityCathodic protection of pipeline systems — Part 1: On-shore pipelinesActiveProvides structural parameters and operational validation guidelines for implementing cathodic protection against corrosion on buried onshore pipelines.
140ISO 15589-22012 EditionISOInspection, Testing & IntegrityCathodic protection of pipeline systems — Part 2: Offshore pipelinesActiveGoverns engineering design, current calculation margins, and sacrificial anode installation criteria for subsea offshore pipelines.
141API RP 1104 (Section 8)2021 EditionAPIInspection, Testing & IntegrityInspection and Testing of Production WeldsActiveSection 8 of API 1104 dictates explicit acceptance criteria for visual testing (VT), radiographic testing (RT), and automatic ultrasonic testing (AUT) for field line production welds.
142BS EN ISO 13628-8:20062026ISOSubsea SystemsPetroleum and natural gas industries — Design and operation of subsea production systems — Part 8: Remotely Operated Vehicle (ROV) interfaces on subsea production systemsActiveDefines ROV interface requirements for subsea production system components.
143DNV-ST-F1012021 EditionDNVPipeline Design & SystemsSubmarine pipeline systemsActiveThe definitive supreme structural and mechanical code for submarine pipeline systems. Outlines extensive rules for limit-state criteria, material configurations, safety factors, and construction parameters.
144DNV-ST-F2012020 EditionDNVPipeline Design & SystemsDynamic risersActiveSpecifies structural design requirements and load criteria for subsea dynamic riser systems, top-tensioned systems, and dynamic flexible ties linked to floating host structures.
145DNV-RP-F1092021 EditionDNVHydrodynamics & MechanicsOn-bottom stability design of submarine pipelinesActiveProvides comprehensive technical methods and recommended practices for calculating lateral and vertical on-bottom stability limits of submarine pipelines against wave and current hydrodynamic forces.
146DNV-RP-F1052019 EditionDNVHydrodynamics & MechanicsFree spanning pipelinesActiveGoverns safety limits and fatigue calculations for open subsea spans subjected to Vortex-Induced Vibrations (VIV) and cyclic structural wave action.
147DNV-RP-F1102022 EditionDNVHydrodynamics & MechanicsGlobal buckling of submarine pipelinesActiveProvides detailed criteria and structural evaluation mechanics for managing global thermal and high-pressure buckling tendencies in deepwater pipelines.
148DNV-RP-F1162021 EditionDNVIntegrity & Corrosion ControlIntegrity management of submarine pipeline systemsActiveEstablishes a rigorous recommended practice framework for risk-based asset integrity management (RBIM), including internal/external line anomaly mitigation and survey execution intervals.
149DNV-RP-F1122021 EditionDNVIntegrity & Corrosion ControlDesign of duplex stainless steel subsea equipment to resist hydrogen induced stress cracking (HISC)ActiveSpecifies explicit limits and design safety configurations to systematically defend duplex and super duplex pipeline joints from HISC risks initiated by cathodic protection loads.
150DNV-RP-F1032021 EditionDNVIntegrity & Corrosion ControlCathodic protection of submarine pipelinesActiveRecommended practice detailing galvanic anode design calculations, specific current density requirements, and installation bounds for marine subsea carriers.
151DNV-RP-F1012022 EditionDNVIntegrity & Corrosion ControlCorroded pipelinesActiveThe standard global guide governing structural fitness-for-service evaluation of actively corroded wall thicknesses under internal internal pressure and external loads.
152DNV-RP-F1072021 EditionDNVRisk & Subsea InterventionRisk assessment of pipeline protectionActivePrescribes explicit risk matrices, probability modeling, and physical structural criteria for pipelines endangered by external threats like trawl gear hooking or vessel dropped objects.
153DNV-RP-F1132024 EditionDNVRisk & Subsea InterventionPipeline subsea repairActiveNewly revised document governing the exact design parameters, mechanical clamp testing, subsea tie-in isolations, and localized structural restoration for damaged lines.
154DNV-RP-F1112017DNVInterference between trawl gear and pipelinesActive
155DNV-RP-C2052021DNVEnvironmental Conditions and Environmental LoadsActive
Logic mới: nhân sự tick IMA trong DS_TK_ALL được xem là nhân sự IMA thực tế; discipline Lead/Leader mặc định là Senior + Discipline + Engineer, các nhân sự khác mặc định Discipline + Engineer và có thể chỉnh lại từng người.

Tuỳ chỉnh Man-hour chart

MHR thực tế tự tính từ bảng nhân sự IMA thực tế. Thay đổi tick IMA trong DS_TK_ALL sẽ thêm/xoá người ở tab này.

Schedule hiển thị timeline, duration theo discipline/work unit và milestones. Không hiển thị nhân lực/headcount.
